chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-750 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 01.06.2023 Mr. Mashooque Ali Mahar advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with ASI Ghulam Mustafa Bhurgri PS Badin and IO/SIP Ghulam Sarwar Khatian PS Ibrahim Hyderi. ----- Ms. Shahnaz Buriro advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant along with certain documents which is taken on record. Petitioner No.1 has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and choice but against wishes of her parents hence being annoyed her father has got subject FIR lodged which is based on wrong facts. IO present has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 in which she has reiterated the same facts. In the light of her statement, the I.O present submits that he would dispose of this case and would submit such report before the learned Magistrate concerned. After such report is submitted, learned Magistrate concerned shall pass an appropriate order on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. disposing of the case, in accordance with law. Petitioners are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above along with pending application. Police officials present are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
